task_completion.description: The product name is set to 'Refurbished Wireless Bluetooth Headphones'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a product title or name input field containing exactly 'Refurbished Wireless Bluetooth Headphones'.

task_completion.description: The description, categories, and image are inherited from the source product.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the description text area, category selection checkboxes, and product image section to be populated with the same content as the original 'Wireless Bluetooth Headphones'.
Look for an 'SKU' input field in the inventory or product data section containing 'WBH-001-REF'.

task_completion.description: The regular price is set to $49.99.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Regular Price' or 'Price' input field containing '49.99'.

task_completion.description: The stock quantity is set to 50.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Stock quantity' or 'Quantity' input field containing '50'.
Look for a success message such as 'Product published' or a status indicator showing 'Published' (rather than 'Draft') on the final product page or listing.

integrity.description: The agent used the web browser GUI to create the product.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for interaction with a web browser (e.g., Chrome, Firefox) navigating an e-commerce admin panel (like WooCommerce, Magento, or Shopify), rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual e-commerce platform.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for standard e-commerce admin interface elements (menus, product data meta boxes, publish panels) rather than a text editor or mock HTML file.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a database client to insert the product.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there are no screenshots showing phpMyAdmin, MySQL CLI, or other database management tools being used to insert rows into the database directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Product Name: 'Refurbished Wireless Bluetooth Headphones'. Target SKU: 'WBH-001-REF'. Target Price: $49.99. Target Stock: 50. Source Product to copy from: 'Wireless Bluetooth Headphones' (SKU: WBH-001). The new product must be published and inherit the description, categories, and image from the source product.
